§7Guide Book #99§r
§lPale Mossheep§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Uncommon
•§lBehavior§r: Passive
•§lMob type§r: Medium mammal, Nature-elemental, Animal.
•§lSpawns in§r: Pale Garden
•§lHealth§r: 8
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25

•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Mossy Willow Sapling
•§lBred by§r: Mossy Willow Sapling
•§lAged by§r: Mossy Willow Sapling
•§lPossible drops§r: Pale Moss Block, Raw Mutton, XP Orbs.
•Mossed Adult Pale Mossheep can produce

a §lPale Moss Block§r, when interacted with using Shears.
•Can eat a Moss Block, Moss Carpet, Pale Moss Block, Pale Moss Carpet, and Moss Sprouts beneath them, and it will restore their sheared moss on their body.
